column1: # Essential fixes — the harness-enabling PRODUCTION fixes that the validation
# "essential" line carries on top of clean upstream/maintenance/gramps<ver>.
# Default validation runs against UPSTREAM. A bundle that FAILS on clean upstream
# but PASSES on the essential line depends on one (or more) of these landing first;
# run-verify.sh detects that, retries on the essential worktree, and stamps the
# Keep this MINIMAL and EVIDENCE-BASED: add a row ONLY once a bundle demonstrably
# fails on upstream because the fix is missing (process/principles.md §8). Each row
# is cherry-picked onto upstream by `make essential-worktrees`.

column4: lazy LinkTag colour — no Gtk widget built at import (headless import-safety)
